nasb.text: Your head crowns you like Carmel, And the flowing locks of your head are like purple threads; The king is captivated by your tresses.

esv.text: Your head crowns you like Carmel, and your flowing locks are like purple; a king is held captive in the tresses.

cnv.text: 你的頭在你身上像迦密山； 你頭上的秀髮是紫黑色的； 君王的心竟給這些髮綹繫住了。

ccb.text: 你的头如同迦密山， 你的秀发好像紫黑色的缎子， 君王的心被你的缕缕青丝系住。
